CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch automatically creates Opportunity Contact Roles for all members of the Primary Contact's Household Account when an Opportunity is created. The role assigned is configured in the Household Member Contact Role setting. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically create Opportunity Contact Roles for all Household members when an Opportunity is created for a Household Contact.
CustomField.label: Household Contact Roles On
